page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software which builds on the l1 plus total variation penalized logistic regression to effectively estimate multiple gene networks corresponding to cell types related by a tree-genealogy, based on only a few samples from each cell type.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software which builds on the l1 plus total variation penalized logistic regression to effectively estimate multiple gene networks corresponding to cell types related by a tree-genealogy, based on only a few samples from each cell type.
